brief_summary: Coral line chart plotting Hall Effect / Rapid Trigger Trends Tracker scores across eight weeks (W18–W25) with values 52, 55, 59, 62, 65, 68, 72, 76. A vertical dashed marker at W22 notes the Computex cycle. The terminal W25 point is a filled coral circle labelled 76 — highest in the switch category for three consecutive weeks.
